contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: BEC finalization: credential-page tree badge + surfacing + docs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/155
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/268
  
  Details:
  Closed out the ERA/Butterfly Effect → BEC effort. Shipped the credential-page tree badge: the shared credential front-end (truesight_me/js/program-shell.js) now renders a '🌳 A tree was planted for this credential' section linking to truesight.me/qr/?id=<pk_hash> when a serialized tree QR exists for the member (fetched from lineage-assets; program-agnostic; derived from qr_code==pk_hash). Added the BEC sunmint card image placeholder. Verified on a local server before shipping to beta + prod. Marked the plan-of-record complete and updated PROGRAM_PARTNER_ONBOARDING.md / CONTEXT_UPDATES so future LLMs can onboard a program partner end-to-end.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
